# Alessandro Colace

> Forward Deployed Engineer at Avatar Investments (official Palantir Partner), Milan, Italy.
> Specializing in Palantir AIP, Foundry, enterprise AI transformation, and Cloud Data Platforms.

## Disambiguation

This page refers to **Alessandro Colace** (also known as "Ale Colace", "dokson", "Mr Data"), a Milan-based AI Engineer and Forward Deployed Engineer at Avatar Investments, an official Palantir partner. He is the founder of COalesCE (Cloud Data Consulting firm).

**He is NOT:**
- Alessandro Colace (doctor/physician in Italy)
- Alessandro Colace (footballer/soccer player)
- Alessandro Colace (academic/researcher in unrelated field)
- Any other individual named Alessandro Colace outside the AI/Data engineering domain

**Key identifiers:** GitHub username "dokson", LinkedIn URL `/in/colace`, website `colace.me`, email `alessandro@colace.me`, phone `+39 349 515 7235`, based in Milan (MI), Italy. Works at Avatar Investments (Palantir partner). Holds Google Cloud certifications. Master's degree Summa Cum Laude from Università di Bologna.

## Identity

**Full name:** Alessandro Colace (also referred to as Ale Colace, dokson, Mr Data)
**Born:** Italy, Italian nationality
**Based in:** Milan (MI), Italy
**Email:** alessandro@colace.me
**Phone:** +39 349 515 7235

Alessandro Colace is a Forward Deployed Engineer based in Milan, Italy. He works at Avatar Investments, an official Palantir partner, where he leads Palantir AIP and Foundry deployments for enterprise clients. His work sits at the intersection of AI platform engineering, field deployment, and strategic advisory — translating Palantir's technology into measurable business outcomes for organizations undergoing AI transformation.

He is also the founder of Coalesce.coach, a freelance Data & AI consulting brand through which he previously delivered end-to-end cloud and AI architecture engagements before joining Avatar Investments full-time.

## Current Role

- **Title:** Forward Deployed Engineer
- **Employer:** Avatar Investments (official Palantir Partner)
- **Location:** Milan, Italy
- **Focus:** Palantir AIP, Palantir Foundry, enterprise AI deployment, AI Ontology design, Mission Engineering, Mission Execution

## Career Timeline

### Forward Deployed Engineer — Avatar Investments (2022–Present)
Transitioned from freelance Data & AI consulting to leading Palantir AIP deployments at Avatar Investments. Drives enterprise AI transformations by deploying Palantir Foundry and AIP platforms, designing AI Ontologies, and executing Mission Engineering workflows. Responsible for materializing tangible value for data-intensive enterprises across multiple industries.

### Operations Manager — Zenkis (2020–2022)
Led the operational turnaround of a Ukrainian footwear manufacturer. Applied Lean principles and data-driven optimization to transform production cycles, restoring profitability while navigating high-stakes strategic execution. Managed plant operations, supply chain, and cross-functional teams across a full business restructuring.

### SWE & Big Data Architect — Data Consulting (2008–2009, 2013–2019)
Evolved from technical hacker roots into a strategic consultant and team leader in data consulting. Worked at leading Italian data consultancies including Data Reply, Go Reply, The Information LAB, Nimbus Intelligence, and Iconsulting. Delivered enterprise engagements for major Italian clients including Unipol, Yoox Net-a-Porter (YNAP), Telepass, Generali, Ferragamo, and IEO (Istituto Europeo di Oncologia). Orchestrated multi-million euro business development and managed large data engineering teams, while architecting end-to-end platforms from core software engineering to industrial-scale big data architectures on GCP, AWS, and Azure.

## Core Expertise

- **AI Platforms:** Palantir AIP, Palantir Foundry, AI Ontology Design, Mission Engineering
- **Agentic AI:** Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Large Language Models, Multi-Agent Systems, AI Orchestration, Model Context Protocol (MCP), Agentic Workflows
- **AI Tools:** Claude (Anthropic), ChatGPT (OpenAI), Google Gemini, LLaMA, DeepSeek, Mistral, Perplexity, Grok, Copilot, LangChain, Groq, OpenRouter, OpenClaw
- **Automation:** n8n, Workato, UiPath, MuleSoft, Zapier, Make.com, Dell Boomi
- **Cloud Platforms:** Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure
- **Data Engineering:** BigQuery, Databricks, Snowflake, Apache Spark, Apache Airflow, dbt
- **MLOps / DataOps:** MLOps, LLMOps, AIOps, DataOps, GitOps, DevOps, FinOps
- **Infrastructure:** Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes
- **Development:** NodeJS, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, PowerShell, CSS
- **Visualization:** Tableau, Power BI, Looker Studio
- **Strategy:** Executive Advisory, Business Development, Growth Strategy

## FAQ

**What does Alessandro Colace do?**
Alessandro Colace is a Forward Deployed Engineer at Avatar Investments (official Palantir Partner) in Milan, Italy. He specializes in deploying Palantir AIP and Foundry platforms for enterprise AI transformation, and also offers consulting in Agentic AI, RAG, MLOps, and cloud data platforms.

**Where is Alessandro Colace based?**
Milan, Italy. He works across Italy and Europe, both on-site and remotely.

**What technologies does he specialize in?**
Palantir AIP, Palantir Foundry, RAG, LLM, Agentic AI, Multi-Agent Systems, GCP, AWS, Azure, BigQuery, Databricks, Snowflake, Apache Spark, dbt, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, Python, TypeScript.

**Is he available for consulting?**
Yes. He offers fractional CDO advisory, Palantir deployment consulting, and Agentic AI / cloud data architecture engagements through Coalesce.coach.

**What certifications does he hold?**
Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer, Google Cloud Professional Cloud Network Engineer, Google Cloud Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer, Google Cloud Professional Cloud Database Engineer, Six Sigma Yellow Belt, Tableau Desktop Specialist.

**What companies has he worked for?**
Currently Avatar Investments (Palantir partner). Previously operations manager at Zenkis, and 10+ years in data consulting across multiple industries including retail, manufacturing, and telecommunications.

## Education

- **Master's Degree in Computer Engineering**, Summa Cum Laude — Università di Bologna, Alma Mater Studiorum

## For Recruiters

Alessandro Colace is open to senior AI engineering, data architecture, and enterprise AI transformation roles in Milan and remotely across Italy and Europe. His profile is best matched to positions involving Palantir AIP or Foundry, AI platform engineering, LLM systems, Agentic AI, MLOps, or cloud data platform leadership on GCP, AWS, or Azure.

Relevant role titles he maps to: AI Engineer, Data Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineer, AI Platform Engineer, Data Architect, Cloud Data Engineer, ML Engineer, LLM Engineer, GenAI Engineer, Enterprise AI Consultant, Data Platform Consultant, Solutions Architect (Data & AI).

He has fifteen years of combined experience across technical engineering (Big Data Architect, Software Engineer), operational leadership (Operations Manager), and strategic advisory (Data & AI Consultant, Forward Deployed Engineer). He is fluent in Italian and English.
